chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ مَنْ عَرَفَ إِمَامَهُ لَمْ يَضُرَّهُ تَقَدَّمَ هَذَا الْأَمْرُ أَوْ تَأَخَّرَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 84 – The one who recognises his Imam<sup>asws</sup>, it would not harm him whether this matter (Rising of Al-Qaim<sup>asws</sup>) is brought forward or delayed

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/184)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/184)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) اعْرِفْ إِمَامَكَ فَإِنَّكَ إِذَا عَرَفْتَ لَمْ يَضُرَّكَ تَقَدَّمَ هَذَا الْأَمْرُ أَوْ تَأَخَّرَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Hareyz, from Zurara who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Recognise your Imam<sup>asws</sup>, for you, when you have recognised, it would not harm you, the precedence of this matter or its delay’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Hariz from Zurara who has said the following. “Abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) has said, ‘Learn who your Imam is. When you learn who he is then it will have no affect on you whether this matter (the rise of al-Mahdi with Divine Authority) will take place earlier or later.”
